articles.title: Iran releases footage of missiles launched at Israel
articles.description: Iran said its attacks were "the beginning of a full week of continuous strikes."

articles.title: Women lured by illegal sperm donor services on social media
articles.description: A BBC investigation paid £100 for one donor’s “baby batter” delivered by post with a carton of passata.

articles.title: At least 19 dead after major earthquake strikes southern Philippines
articles.description: The magnitude-7.8 quake triggered small tsunami waves in the Philippines, Indonesia and Japan.

articles.title: Christian Eriksen 'in good spirits' after collapsing in Denmark game, team's doctor says
articles.description: Christian Eriksen is "in good spirits" following his collapse against Ukraine and is expected to be discharged from hospital soon, says Denmark's national team doctor Morten Boesen.
